titleStmt.title: SII 5.636: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 636. (A.R. No. 78 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE, LEFT OF ENTRANCE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiru manni vaḷara Irunila maṭant Aiyum porcceyap pāvaiyu
m cīrttanic celviyum tan perun=te viyarāki Inpuṟa neṭutuya ruḻiyu ḷiṭai
tuṟaināṭum tuṭarvanavelip paṭar vanvāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷi
ppākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraiyarta
muṭiyum Āṅkavan ṟeviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum mun navarpakkal tennavan
vaiytta cun=ta ra muṭiyu minti ra nāramum tenṟicai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum E
ṟipaṭaik keraḷan muṟaimaiyil cūṭuma kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ mu
ṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅ kāval pala paḻan=ti vum ceru
vil cinavi Irupattorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāman melvaruñ cān=ti maṟṟivaraṇ karu
ti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyai mutuki
ṭ ṭoḷitta cayaciṅkan Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiyal raṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navane
ti naṟkulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutiṟpaṭaval
lai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷar nāmaṇaiykkoṇaiyum veñci
laivira pañcappaḷḷiyum pāciṭaippaḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti(y) yāti
nakaravaiyil can=ti ran tolkulat tin=ti raratanai viḷai yamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu pa
la tanattoṭu niṟaikulatanak kuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai yoṭṭaviṣayamum pūcurar cer nal
kocalaināṭum tanamapālanai vemmunai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyu
m Iraṇacūranai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇakirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=ta (ca)can=ta na māviḻi
n=to ṭat taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭal caṅku voṭṭaṭai mayipālanai
veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yānaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittalaneṭu
ṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirtta teṟipunal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ pala kalañ
celuttic caṅkirāmavicaiyattuṅkapanma nākiya kaṭārattaraiyanai vākayam porukaṭal kumpaṟka
riyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum Ārttava na(na)k(ā)nakar porttoḻi
l vācalil viccātiratoraṇamum moyttaḷir punamaṇip putavamum kanamaṇik katavamum niṟai jīvicai
yamum tuṟainīrp pannaiyum vanmalaiyuraiyiṟ ṟonmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭa lakaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭi
liṅkamum kalaṅkā valvinai Ilaṅkācokamum koppuṟu niṟaipunal māpappāḷamum kāvalam
puricai mevilimpaṅkamum viḷappantūṟuṭai vaḷappantūṟum kalaittakkol pukaḻ talait
takkolamum titamāmalvinai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmurik kaṭun=ti ṟal(l) lāmuritecamum
tenakkalar poḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumuraṟkiṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparake
caripanma rāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājendra coḻade varkku yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu Irājendra ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu tiru
maḻuvāṭi ma hāde varkku Uyyakkoṇṭānvaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu keraḷān=ta kaccaturve timaṅkalattu nara kkaṇ śrī
kraṣṇa n Irāmanāna rājendra coḻabrahma mārāyar de viyār śrīkraṣṇa n kaucalaiyār Uṭaiyārkku Iravum pakalum Erivataṟku Oru ti
runon=tā viḷakkukku vaiytta kācu nūṟum meṟpaṭiyārey vaiytta tarā nilaiviḷakku Onṟu Uḷkaru vuṭppaṭa niṟai 2 100 2 10 4 palam
Ittirunon=tā viḷakkukku vaiytta kācu nūṟum koṇṭu Āṭu toṇṇūṟu koṇṭu can=ti rātittaval Iravum pakalum Ittirunon=tā vi
ḷakku Eriya nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ varkkattārum Aṭṭakkaṭavomenṟu manṟāṭi celvan kuṭṭeṟan koṇṭa kācu Irupattaiñcināl
Āṭu Irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl Āṇṭuvarai Aṭṭakkaṭava ney Irupattirunāḻi Uriyum celvan parampan koṇṭa kācu Irupattaiñcinā
l Āṭu Irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl Aṭṭakkaṭava ney Irupattirunāḻi Uriyum Eccil Aravaṇaiyānum cūṟṟi tirumaḻupāṭiyum nakkan kaṭikāca
lanum koṇṭa kācu Irupattaiñcināl Āṭu Irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl Aṭṭakkaṭava ney Irupattirunāḻi Uriyum tāḻi tiripuvanavicai
yan koṇṭa kācu Irupattaiñcināl Āṭu Irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl ney Irupattirunāḻi Uriyum Āka Ivvanaivomākak koṇṭa
kācu nūṟināl Āṭu toṇṇūṟināl Āṇṭuvarai Aṭṭakkaṭava ney toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻiyum nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ varkkattārum can=ti rā
tittaval Aṭṭakkaṭavomānom Itu panmā heśva ra rakṣai—
Digital edition of SII 5.636 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
